title: When to ask for a ruling - Canada.ca
content:
## When to ask for a ruling

## Time limit for a payer or a worker
A payer or worker can ask for a ruling by June 29 of the year after the year the question relates to.
For example, if the employment took place in 2025, you can ask for a ruling no later than June 29, 2026. When June 29 falls on a Saturday or a Sunday, your request is considered on time if the CRA receives it or if it is postmarked on the next business day.

## Service Canada or the CRA
Service Canada or the CRA can ask for a ruling at any time for the administration of their programs.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
